name: 00-wp-logout-intercept
condition: ${(matches(request.uri.path, '^/app1/wp-login[.]php$') or (request.headers['Host'] != null and request.headers['Host'][0] != null and matches(request.headers['Host'][0], '(?i)^wp-a[.]sso[.]local([.].*)?(:[0-9]+)?$') and matches(request.uri.path, '^/wp-login[.]php$'))) and request.uri.query != null and matches(request.uri.query, '(^|&)action=logout($|&)')}
